name: raycast-image-uploader
title: Image Uploader
description: Upload clipboard images to S3 and browse recent uploads
author: user

commands.name: upload-image
commands.title: Upload Image
commands.description: Upload clipboard image to S3 and copy URL

preferences.name: s3Endpoint
preferences.title: S3 Endpoint
preferences.description: URL of your S3-compatible endpoint (e.g. http://100.x.x.x:9000). Use HTTPS in production to protect credentials in transit.

preferences.name: uploadWithoutAsking
preferences.title: Upload Without Asking
preferences.description: When enabled, uploads immediately without confirmation
preferences.label: Upload without asking for confirmation

preferences.name: recentImageCount
preferences.title: Recent Image Count
preferences.description: Number of recent uploads to keep in history
